# Copilot Instructions
<!-- GLOBAL ONLY. Do NOT add agent-specific rules here (knowledge-keeper calls,
     Stop hook behaviour, scanner-update, etc.) — those belong in dev.agent.md. -->

- Follow all constraints in `.ai/rules.md`.
- Before modifying code, check the injected module index for relevant knowledge
  files and read them.
- If the user expressed a new constraint or preference, update `.ai/rules.md`.
- If a significant architecture decision was made, record it in `.ai/decisions/`.
